message:
fix(extensions): always set cwd on exec hostcall child processes

Change extension exec dispatcher to always set current_dir() on spawned
child processes instead of conditionally setting it only when the
extension provides a cwd option:

- Parse cwd option as PathBuf, falling back to self.cwd (the project
  working directory) when not specified
- Remove the conditional if-let block and always call .current_dir(&cwd)

This prevents extensions from accidentally inheriting whatever cwd the
pi process happens to have, which could be different from the project
directory (e.g., when launched from a different directory).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -77,6 +77,13 @@ jobs:
         env:
           PI_BENCH_BINARY: target/release/pi
 
+      - name: Generate PiJS workload perf data (JSONL)
+        run: |
+          set -euxo pipefail
+          mkdir -p target/perf
+          cargo run --release --bin pijs_workload -- --iterations 2000 --tool-calls 1 > target/perf/pijs_workload.jsonl
+          cargo run --release --bin pijs_workload -- --iterations 2000 --tool-calls 10 >> target/perf/pijs_workload.jsonl
+
       - name: Generate benchmark summary
         run: |
           echo "## Benchmark Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
@@ -103,7 +110,11 @@ jobs:
             done
           fi
 
+      - name: Perf budget gate
+        run: cargo test --test perf_budgets -- --nocapture
+
       - name: Upload benchmark results
+        if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
           name: benchmark-results-${{ github.sha }}

   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+  RUSTFLAGS: -D warnings
 
 jobs:
   benchmark:

       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly

-          # Check binary size budget
           SIZE_MB=$(stat --printf="%s" target/release/pi | awk '{printf "%.2f", $1/1024/1024}')
           echo "Binary size: ${SIZE_MB}MB"
           if (( $(echo "$SIZE_MB > 20" | bc -l) )); then
             echo "::error::Binary size ${SIZE_MB}MB exceeds 20MB budget"
             exit 1
           fi
 
+      - name: Run benchmarks
+        run: |
+          cargo bench --bench tools -- --noplot
+          cargo bench --bench extensions -- --noplot
+          cargo bench --bench system -- --noplot
+

+          cargo run --release --bin pijs_workload -- --iterations 2000 --tool-calls 10 >> target/perf/pijs_workload.jsonl
+
+      - name: Perf budget gate
+        run: cargo test --test perf_budgets -- --nocapture
+
       - name: Upload benchmark results
